nasb.text: “Whoever is naive, let him turn in here,” And to him who lacks understanding she says,

esv.text: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!” And to him who lacks sense she says,

cnv.text: “誰是愚蒙人，可以到這裡來！” 又對無知的人說：

ccb.text: “愚昧人啊，到这里来吧！” 她又对无知者说：

csbs.text: 她说：“谁是无知的人呢？让他转到我这里来！” 又对那缺乏心智的人说：
